title: Exhale
description: Exploring personal growth and letting go.
lyrics: I'm finding light Here you are, right in the moment It's life or death, it's your fight or flight Baby you exhale, oh It feels like it's over now, yeah Let it go and exhale, exhale All your demons and deniers, yeah Fight up the dark, fight up yourself Fight up anything you need to get past Hold it in, and then the moment comes Where you don't think it will last Exhale Yeah, be real And just breathe your breath like everyone Exhale Let go of the Constructs of what you thought was right And at night, ask yourself if you're Home of the brave in the land of Lie just for me, greed just for me, yeah Egreed just for me, just agreeing with you Just appeasing everyone Just not crossing that line, cause Feelings get hurt, but no bones are broken Told us the story from the moment our ears were opened Calculate your calculated response to life Don't sit there, instead exhale Exhale All your taught foundations of hate Let it go and, oh Exhale Be real Be that I'm mine, and light up down It's just a light of every star once you learn You let go, it comes back You let go, it's not there You let go before, but people die And why are you holding on to all the echoes of that All the hurt just held you there Let it go, yeah Gotta exhale In the final moments of your fight for the wrong Exhale That's for it all to carry on Cause even when you're gone, they're still here And they're gone, you're still there, yeah You're gone still, all gone rocking In your mind a different level Can't understand magic Cause maybe it looks a little different Well, take it and exhale Let it go And after the fight Take a rest, look back, reflect It's your right
